---
title: "About"
image: SeanMadenProfile1.jpg
---

Sean Maden is a bioinformatics researcher with expertise in epigenetics and data science. He is interested in open-access research projects for data science. Sean has developed several analysis workflows (e.g. [recountmethylation_instance](https://github.com/metamaden/recountmethylation_instance) and [r-nf_deconvolution](https://github.com/metamaden/r-nf_deconvolution)) and R/Bioconductor software packages (e.g. [recountmethylation](https://www.bioconductor.org/packages/release/bioc/html/recountmethylation.html) and [lute](https://github.com/metamaden/lute)) for genomics research.
